description: Provision PostgreSQL infrastructure via Pulumi, add CI workflows for deployment and testing, configure NetworkPolicy and monitoring. Part of design doc 007 (Infra + Ops workstream).

userStories.title: Add CloudNativePG to Pulumi platform stack
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want CloudNativePG provisioned via Pulumi so that dev and production environments have managed PostgreSQL with WAL archiving, backups, and per-service credentials.
acceptanceCriteria: CNPG operator Helm chart deployed via Pulumi Helm Release
Cluster CRD created via Pulumi K8s provider with per-service credentials from stack config
resourceTier config sizes requests/limits per Resource Sizing section
enableDataChecksums: true configured
Storage uses Linode Block Storage for both dev and production
WAL archiving configured to Linode Object Storage via barmanObjectStore
WAL and data encryption enabled (AES256)
wal_level=logical set for future CDC use cases
initdb creates per-service databases
pg_hba.conf configured with hostssl entries only
postgresql.parameters set: shared_buffers, effective_cache_size, max_connections
Per-service database users and K8s Secrets created (tdp-<service>-db-credentials)
ScheduledBackup CRD configured for daily base backups
Wired into index.ts deployment sequence (operator → Cluster → app deployments)
Pulumi.dev.yaml and Pulumi.production.yaml updated with CNPG config
Linode Object Storage credentials stored as Pulumi secrets

userStories.title: Add NetworkPolicy for database traffic
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want NetworkPolicy rules so that database traffic is explicitly allowed within the default-deny-all policy framework, maintaining security while enabling connectivity.
acceptanceCriteria: Egress NetworkPolicy in tdp namespace: app pods → CNPG Cluster pods on port 5432
Egress from CNPG Postgres pods to Linode Object Storage (HTTPS/443) for WAL archiving
Ingress on CNPG Postgres pods from CNPG operator in cnpg-system namespace
Follows existing pattern in tdp-default-deny.yaml and tdp-allow-traefik.yaml
Schema-registry can connect to Postgres with policies enforced
userStories.notes: Effort: S. Independent but logically follows US-001.

userStories.title: Add CI workflow for Pulumi infrastructure deployment
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want GitHub Actions workflows that run pulumi up on git events so that infrastructure changes are deployed automatically through the environment promotion pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Dev deployment workflow: triggered on push to main, runs pulumi up on dev stacks sequentially
Production deployment workflow: triggered on release tag, runs pulumi up on production stacks
Production uses GitHub Environment protection rule requiring manual approval
Both workflows run pulumi preview first and post diff as check summary
Pulumi access token, Linode token, and Object Storage credentials stored as GitHub Actions secrets
production GitHub Environment created with required reviewers configured
userStories.notes: Effort: M. Logically depends on US-001 (Pulumi modules must exist).

userStories.title: Add Postgres to CI pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Postgres service container in CI so that integration tests run against a real database instead of mocks.
acceptanceCriteria: services: postgres: section added to ci.yml with health checks
DATABASE_URL env var set for test jobs
Alembic migrations run before tests
Tests using get_db_session pass against real Postgres
Documentation on how local integration tests use Tiltfile-provisioned Postgres
userStories.notes: Effort: M. Independent — CI Postgres is a service container, not CNPG.

userStories.title: Add Postgres monitoring dashboard and alerts
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want CNPG Prometheus metrics wired into the monitoring stack with alerts so that database health issues are detected before they impact services.
acceptanceCriteria: CNPG PodMonitor or ServiceMonitor enabled for Prometheus scraping
Official CNPG Grafana dashboard (#20417) deployed via monitoring Pulumi module or ConfigMap
PrometheusRule CRD with alerts: connection pool saturation (>80% max_connections)
PrometheusRule alert: PVC usage > 80%
PrometheusRule alert: long-running queries (> 5 min)
PrometheusRule alert: WAL archiving failures
PrometheusRule alert: replication lag (future-proofing for HA)
Alerts complement backup-specific alerts in TDP-007-10
userStories.notes: Effort: M. Logically depends on US-001 (CNPG must be deployed to have metrics).
